title: lithocarpus uvariifolius
intro: Lithocarpus uvariifolius, also known as the Chinese hazelnut or Chinese nut oak, is a plant species in the beech family (Fagaceae) native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol and triglyceride levels, as well as reducing blood pressure and inflammation. Lithocarpus uvariifolius can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tea, capsules, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
